holdings.infoBox: IVW is an equity ETF with a total of 149 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 14.49%, Microsoft at 8.33%, Apple at 6.11%, Alphabet at 6.08%, and Broadcom at 5.24%.

overview.description: The iShares S&P 500 Growth ETF (IVW) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Growth index. The fund tracks an index of large-cap US stocks. The index selects stocks with growth characteristics from the S&P 500 Index, based on three growth factors. IVW was launched on May 22, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.
